channel.title: Weekly Previews
channel.description: Weekly pull list of new releases with thumbnails and links to full-size cover images.

item.title: ABSOLUTE GREEN ARROW #1 (OF 6) CVR E RAFAEL ALBUQUERQUE FOIL VAR
item.dc:creator: Weekly Previews
item.description: ABSOLUTE GREEN ARROW #1 (OF 6) CVR E RAFAEL ALBUQUERQUE FOIL VAR is part of this week's pull list. This release is now available and featured in the Weekly Previews. Click the cover image above to view the full-size image from the publisher. This item was included in the weekly shipment and is ready for pickup or delivery.
